plan_binding_snapshot.title: CP00-413 RP13.P08.M03.S16-RP13.P08.M05.S13 generated_from_weighted_implementation_ledger
plan_binding_snapshot.renumbering_policy: Pack IDs are monotonic after the latest live closeout pack. If a requested locked queue skips live-open ledger units, live-open units are inserted first and requested packs are shifted with correction_reason.

implementation_summary.summary: CP00-413 implements descriptor-only coverage of the RP13.P08 implementation workflow slice: the M03 Primary Implementation Slice tail (the seven remaining rows), the full M04 Secondary Workflow Slice cycle (twenty rows), and the M05 Permission And Audit Binding head (the first thirteen rows) as three descriptor-only sections over 40 planned rows with Hermes evidence (H13), Claude review packet (C13), and CP00-414 handoff, without opening payments, payment matching, AR aging, or journal entry runtime or any other closed runtime surface.

parsed_review.summary: CP00-413 is a clean descriptor-only RP13.P08 implementation workflow slice pack (risk B, 40 units, RP13.P08.M03.S16-RP13.P08.M05.S13) verified entirely through read-only inspection. The CP413 binding, requirements, no-write attestation, service descriptor/case-set, validators, contract projection, README entry, and tests are internally consistent: deliverable distribution (17 implementation / 2 test / 19 hermes_evidence / 2 claude_review = 40) and micro-title distribution (Primary Implementation Slice 7 / Secondary Workflow Slice 20 / Permission And Audit Binding 13) reconcile exactly against the baseline included_units, and the contract current_pack plus historical bindings tail both resolve to CP00-413 with next CP00-414 / RP13.P08.M05.S14. No-write and no-real-data boundaries are intact: freezeCp413Result stamps every runtime/state/audit/storage flag false, the package source contains no fs/child_process/write operations, and both manifest and command-evidence declare production_ready=false, implementation_layer=descriptor, no_real_data=true, writes_product_state=false — a conservative, non-overclaiming posture supported by all pre-review validation commands recorded at exit 0. Authority boundaries hold: descriptor authority_boundary.claude_is_final_approval=false with human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening=true, NO_WRITE_ATTESTATION.promotes_claude_to_final_approval=false and claims_enterprise_trust_from_local_validation=false, all enforced by validators, tests, and the contract validator; the review request is read-only (Read/Grep/Glob). CP178+ review hardening is present via forbidden_review_evidence (failed_authentication_run, zero_byte_output, malformed_json_output, fenced_json_output, tool_call_shaped_output, missing-field/source-mutation/final-approval/enterprise-trust blockers) and a passing auth preflight. Hermes patterns are used only for deterministic evidence packet/receipt handling (emits_hermes_runtime_receipt=false, hermes_runtime_embedded_in_product=false), not product runtime. Post-review-gated commands are correctly deferred to the accepted review result per the hardened review sequence. No defects found; Claude remains a read-only reviewer and not the final approver.

commit_policy.message: Close CP00-413 payments core p08 implementation workflow slice descriptor pack
